name: Starbucks Corporation
description: Starbucks Corporation is an American multinational chain of coffeehouses and roastery reserves headquartered in Seattle, Washington. Founded in 1971, the company has grown to become the premier roaster and retailer of specialty coffee in the world. Starbucks is committed to ethically sourcing and roasting the highest quality arabica coffee, operating thousands of retail locations across the globe. Beyond its signature coffee beverages, the company offers a variety of teas, pastries, and other food items, maintaining a strong global brand presence focused on creating a unique customer experience and community connection.
